name: line_bold_single

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.6 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-07-01] The single-line bold marker この行はゴシック体 (29 corpus occurrences): a zero-width LineBold marker node — the single-line counterpart of the ゴシック体 compound-indent clause — rendering and flagging its line as bold. Serialization is byte-exact (the marker keeps its この行はゴシック体 spelling, unlike the forward-reference は太字 canonicalisation). Distinct from the ［＃ゴシック体］ bare block opener and the ［＃「X」はゴシック体］ forward-reference leaf.

source: ［＃この行はゴシック体］本文行

expected.serialize: ［＃この行はゴシック体］本文行
